judgment.summary: eBay shows strong profitability and growth but carries significant debt relative to its equity.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 5.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-29.
positives: Profit margin 17.6% — healthy for the sector.
Return on equity 42.9% — excellent shareholder returns.
Forward P/E 17.53x — attractive relative to trailing P/E.
Revenue growth 19.5% YoY — solid top-line expansion.
Free cash flow $1.20B TTM — strong cash generation.
negatives: Total debt $7.21B vs $3.86B cash — significant net debt.
Mean analyst target $108.13 — below current price.
Beta 1.39 — higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines to provide context, traders should focus on eBay's fundamentals and upcoming earnings report. The company recently beat Q1 estimates, and the next earnings date is set for July 29th. The market will be looking for continued execution and management's outlook for the remainder of the year.
